description_long: This is a two-seater sofa with a rounded, plush silhouette and a distinctive patterned upholstery. The fabric features a repeating circular motif in shades of blue, gray, and off-white, giving it a textured and visually dynamic appearance. The seat and backrest are generously padded, with three visible seat cushions and three backrest sections, all appearing to be attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are wide, rounded, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's overall form. The backrest is high and gently curved, providing ample support and comfort. The sofa sits on small, barely visible legs, giving it a grounded and stable look.
description: A plush, two-seater sofa with rounded, padded armrests and a blue-gray circular patterned upholstery. Features three attached seat and back cushions and a high, curved backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three seat and back cushions, and the rounded, padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, thick seat cushion, and the curve of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, patterned backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the sofa's depth and the plushness of the seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching backrest sections, all integrated into the sofa's frame with no visible separation.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rounded, and padded armrests that are integrated into the sofa's body, rising slightly above the seat level and curving outward for comfort.
attribute_leg_design: Small, dark, and minimally visible legs located at the corners, likely block or recessed style, providing subtle elevation and stability.
attribute_backrest_type: High, gently curved, and continuous backrest divided into three padded sections, offering full back support and a plush appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Patterned upholstery with a repeating circular motif in blue, gray, and off-white tones, creating a textured and visually dynamic surface.
